stock_predictions.astro_factor: Mercury in Virgo boosts tech focus
Sun square Neptune clouds digital outlook
Pluto in Aquarius amplifies AI potential
Uranus square Mercury indicates communication shifts

horoscope_insights.Aries: Take calculated risks today. Focus on short-term trades.
horoscope_insights.Taurus: Trust long-term investments. Real estate and finance favored.
horoscope_insights.Gemini: Double-check market news. Avoid hasty decisions.
horoscope_insights.Cancer: Emotion-driven markets may affect your strategy. Stay rational.
horoscope_insights.Leo: Confidence is high. Use it to make bold stock choices.
horoscope_insights.Virgo: Detail-oriented analysis pays off today. Study charts closely.
horoscope_insights.Libra: Seek balance in portfolio. Diversify your holdings.
horoscope_insights.Scorpio: Intense focus brings clarity. Good day for market research.
horoscope_insights.Sagittarius: Explore new sectors or tech stocks. Be adventurous.
horoscope_insights.Capricorn: Discipline rewards you today. Stick to your investment rules.
horoscope_insights.Aquarius: Innovation drives gains. AI and green energy are promising.
horoscope_insights.Pisces: Intuition guides you well. But confirm with facts.
